current.headline: Tuchel Warns England Over Haaland Danger in Historic Norway Clash
current.summary: Thomas Tuchel has urged England's defence to remain hyper-focused on Erling Haaland, who has scored 7 goals in this World Cup, including a brace to eliminate Brazil.

items.headline: Haaland: Kane is a beast, but Norway is ready for England
items.summary: Speaking ahead of the quarter-final, Erling Haaland paid tribute to England captain Harry Kane, calling him a world-class striker, but insisted Norway can pull off another shock.
